channel.title: All Teams - Release Notes
channel.description: Combined release notes from all teams

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.9.0
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Amazon Signage Stick (ASS) dedicated player. Previously ran Amazon Fire OS player on ASS device.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.7.16
item.description:
ScreenCloud

Rollback release fixing issues introduced in v4.7.12. Released at 50% for Fire OS players alongside v4.6.30.

View release notes →

item.title: ScreenCloud - 4.11.2
item.description:
ScreenCloud

New: Support for Amazon’s Remote Device Management (RDM) for Signage Sticks, including:Screen/TV mute and unmute via HDMI-CECScreen/TV power on and off via HDMI-CECDevice rebootScreenshot and full-screen captureDeep cache clearing (player app and Android system cache)Player app restartCPU and GPU...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Generate custom music in Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro
item.description:
Google Workspace

You can now generate custom music in Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Lyria 3 Pro, Google’s latest music generation model.Using text-based prompting, Vids users can generate clips (about 30 seconds) or longer tracks (up to three minutes) for their video projects. A user might, for instance, need...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Create longer musical tracks in the Gemini app with Lyria 3 Pro
item.description:
Google Workspace

Last month, we introduced 30-second tracks with Lyria 3, featuring custom music generation designed to spark creative expression. Now, we’re also introducing Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced version that allows users to create tracks up to three minutes long, with customization and creative control. Lyria...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Safeguarded guest admit flow in Google Meet
item.description:
Google Workspace

The new safeguarded guest admit flow assists hosts in meetings when they respond to users who ask to join meetings (also known as ”knocking”). This makes it easier for hosts to handle large volumes of requests and helps reduce the attention and time needed.Meeting hosts will now get those requests...

View release notes →

item.title: NinjaOne - Gain Better IT Asset Control and Visibility into Software Licensing With NinjaOne 13.0
item.description:
NinjaOne

NinjaOne’s 13.0 release advances IT asset management (ITAM) capabilities with software license improvements that offer greater cost visibility, usage history for custom licenses, and refined control over permissions and assignments. The platform now includes robust Lost Mode support for managed...

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - New endpoints for Survey Management API
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | Added new Survey Management API endpoints to retrieve detailed information for survey and account instances.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Rebrand "Team Chat" to "Chat"
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | As of March 22, 2026, "Zoom Team Chat" is renamed to "Zoom Chat" or "Chat" (in brief). No feature or functionality is affected by this name change.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 3.1.2
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Fixed CSS style and worker message bugs.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Add new response fields to Account Management, Quote and Subscription APIs
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New enhancements added to Account Management, Quote and Subscription API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Twenty new APIs and two new webhook events; additional request and response fields in existing endpoints and events
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | Twenty new APIs and two new webhook events; additional request and response fields across over 25 API endpoints and 8 webhook events.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Google Workspace Updates Weekly Recap - March 20, 2026
item.description:
Google Workspace

Easily find and set time zones in Google Calendar by searching for city or countryWe’re introducing an improved time zone picker for Google Calendar on the web. Instead of manually scrolling through the list of options, you can now simply search for and select a specific city or country, making it...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - New ways to customize and interact with your content in NotebookLM
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing several updates to NotebookLM that give users more flexibility when uploading sources, new ways to create and edit visuals from NotebookLM and improvements to the interactive study tools.More functions and new visual communication toolsSlide revisions: Users can now revise...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29553.1000
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we’re releasing Windows Insider Preview Build 29553.1000 to the Windows 11 Insider Canary Channel on the optional 29500 build series. What’s new in Canary Build 29553.1000 Change The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build for Canary Channel 29553.1000...

View release notes →

item.title: Windows - Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1743 (Canary Channel)
item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1743 to the Canary Channel. (KB 5081339) What’s new in Canary Build 28020.1743 Changes and Improvements g The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 28020.1743 (Canary Channel) appeared first on Windows...

View release notes →

item.description:
Windows

Hello Windows Insiders, today we are releasing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8085 (KB 5079483 The post Announcing Windows 11 Insider Preview Build 26300.8085 (Dev Channel) appeared first on Windows Insider Blog.

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Introducing the new Meetings section in Google Chat
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing a dedicated Meetings section in Google Chat—a new way to organize your conversation list and keep your meeting conversations in one place.Previously, meeting conversations lived in your direct messages, often making it difficult to find specific project discussions or meeting...

View release notes →

item.title: Google Workspace - Workspace audit logs: New functionality and expanded event fields
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re releasing a number of enhancements to Workspace audit logs, including:Log filtering enhancements for Resource fields in the security investigation tool for Gmail and Google DriveUpdated Application and Network fields available in the Workspace audit log integration with Google Security...

View release notes →

Version 3.15.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has arrived!

item.title: Google Workspace - Easily find and set time zones in Google Calendar by searching for city or country
item.description:
Google Workspace

We’re introducing an improved time zone picker for Google Calendar on the web. Instead of manually scrolling through the list of options, you can now simply search for and select a specific city or country, making it easier to coordinate and schedule with others in different time zones.This...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - March 13, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Optional scopes have landed
item.description:
Slack

You can now mark individual OAuth scopes as optional when configuring your Slack app! Optional scopes give users more control over what data your app can access during installation, without blocking them from installing your app entirely.

View release notes →

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: bug-fix, sdk-version | Optimize CSS message transmission performance and bugfix.

item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release | New request fields added to User API.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Version 2.3.15-1
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: action-required, bug-fix, sdk-version | Addresses a WebRTC issue that caused session negotiation failures and fallback to WASM on Chrome 147 and later. If you rely on WebRTC video, we strongly advise that you upgrade to ensure compatibility with upcoming Chrome versions.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - interactive visual module
item.description:
ChatGPT

“Help me understand the Pythagorean theorem.”“Explain how PV = nRT works.”“How do I find the area of a circle?” Availability: Rolling out to all logged-in ChatGPT users across consumer and business plans.

View release notes →

item.title: Zoom - Zoom AI Services - Now available to all developers!
item.description:
Zoom

Tags: api-release, new-feature | We are excited to announce the general availability of Zoom AI Services, a suite of enterprise-grade intelligence APIs for speech, language and vision processing, built on the same technology that powers AI features and processes millions of media hours daily across...

View release notes →

item.title: Ad Astra - March 6, 2026
item.description:
Ad Astra
View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We're committed to bringing Google's latest AI innovations faster to Google AI Ultra users, including our most powerful reasoning capabilities to help you tackle even more complex problems.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve mod
item.description:
Gemini

What: We’re releasing a major upgrade to Gemini 3 Deep Think, our specialized reasoning mode, built to push the frontier of intelligence and solve modern challenges across science, research, and engineering. By blending deep scientific knowledge with everyday engineering utility, Deep Think now...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With the advanced reasoning of Gemini 3.1 Pro, you can now tackle your most co
item.description:
Gemini

Why: We want to make Gemini the most helpful AI assistant for everyone. With the advanced reasoning of Gemini 3.1 Pro, you can now tackle your most complex projects with greater confidence.

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - What: Building on the Gemini 3 series, we’re releasing 3.1 Pro, a smarter and more capable model for complex problem-solving. 3.1 Pro is designed for
item.description:
Gemini

What: Building on the Gemini 3 series, we’re releasing 3.1 Pro, a smarter and more capable model for complex problem-solving. 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough, taking advanced reasoning and making it useful for your hardest challenges. This improved intelligence can...

View release notes →

item.title: Gemini - Try Gemini
item.description:
Gemini
View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - GPT-5 Instant
item.description:
ChatGPT

The model is trained to more accurately detect and respond to potential signs of mental and emotional distress. These updates were guided by mental health experts, and help ChatGPT de-escalate conversations and point people to real-world crisis resources when appropriate, while still using language...

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Plus, Pro, Business and Enterprise/Edu
item.description:
ChatGPT

Installing the app requires the connector to be enabled for your account. Visit the ChatGPT app for Slack page to get started with installation.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - Free, Go, Plus, Edu, and Pro
item.description:
ChatGPT
View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - ChatGPT Images
item.description:
ChatGPT

All images you create with ChatGPT are automatically saved under My images at https://chatgpt.com/images, giving you a single place to browse, revisit, and reuse your work without having to sift through past conversations. Learn more about ChatGPT Images in our ChatGPT Images FAQ.

View release notes →

item.title: ChatGPT - adjust course mid-response
item.description:
ChatGPT
View release notes →

item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have pag
item.description:
Canva

The Get design pages API now returns page dimensions for pages in bounded designs (unbounded designs like whiteboards and Canva Docs will not have page dimensions).

View release notes →

item.title: Canva - The List folder items API now supports a pin_status parameter to filter for pinned items in a folder.
item.description:
Canva
View release notes →

item.description:
Slack

The following new supported markdown types for rich text when using Block Kit in your apps are being rolled out:

item.title: ChatGPT - This update to GPT-5 Instant is starting to roll out to ChatGPT users today.
item.description:
ChatGPT
View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Set status method scope update
item.description:
Slack

The assistant.threads.setStatus API method now accepts either the assistantwrite scope. This allows channel-based apps to use AI loading states in channels, without having to request assistantwrite scope in favor of the chat:write scope exclusively, so update your app soon!

View release notes →

item.title: Slack - Release: Slack CLI v3.14.0
item.description:
Slack

Version 3.14.0 of the developer tools for the Slack platform has landed!

View release notes →
